lines.english: - this is the longing of Nanak's mind. ||1||
He is the Fulfiller of wishes, who can give us Sanctuary;
That which He has written, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਨ ਭਰਨ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਫੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: haran bharan jaa kaa netr for |
lines.english: He destroys and creates in the twinkling of an eye.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਹੋਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa mantru na jaanai hor |
lines.english: No one else knows the mystery of His ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਰੂਪ ਮੰਗਲ ਸਦ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: anad roop mangal sad jaa kai |
lines.english: He is the embodiment of ecstasy and everlasting joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: raaj meh raaj jog meh jogee |
lines.english: Among kings, He is the King; among yogis, He is the Yogi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਥੋਕ ਸੁਨੀਅਹਿ ਘਰਿ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: sarab thok suneeeh ghar taa kai |
lines.english: I have heard that all things are in His home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪ ਮਹਿ ਤਪੀਸਰੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਸਤ ਮਹਿ ਭੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: tap meh tapeesar grihasat meh bhogee |
lines.english: Among ascetics, He is the Ascetic; among householders, He is the Enjoyer.
By constant meditation, His devotee finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak tis purakh kaa kinai ant na paaeaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, no one has found the limits of that Supreme Being. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਲੀਲਾ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee leelaa kee mit naeh |
lines.english: There is no limit to His play.
All the demigods have grown weary of searching for it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਤਾ ਕਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਕਿ ਜਾਨੈ ਪੂਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: pitaa kaa janam ki jaanai poot |
lines.english: What does the son know of his father's birth?
All are strung upon His string.
On His humble servants and slaves who meditate on the Naam.
He bestows good sense, spiritual wisdom and meditation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਰਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tihu gun meh jaa kau bharamaae |
lines.english: He leads some astray in the three qualities;
As He inspires us to know Him, O Nanak, so is He known. ||3||
they are born and die, coming and going over and over again.
The high and the low are His places.
Many are the appearances which He assumes, and yet He is still the One.
In so many ways, He has extended Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਾ ਰੂਪ ਨਾਨਾ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ॥
lines.translit: naanaa roop naanaa jaa ke rang |
lines.english: Many are His forms; many are His colors.
The Eternal Lord God is the One, the Creator.
He performs His many plays in an instant.
The Perfect Lord is pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਘਟ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਸਭ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt tis ke sabh tis ke tthaau |
lines.english: All hearts are His, and all places are His.
In so many ways, He created the creation.
He alone can estimate His worth.
The Naam is the Support of all creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jap jap jeevai naanak har naau |4|
lines.english: Nanak lives by chanting, chanting the Name of the Lord. ||4||
The Naam is the Support of the earth and solar systems.
The Naam is the Support of the Akaashic ethers and the nether regions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਸੁਨਨ ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: naam ke dhaare sunan giaan dhiaan |
lines.english: The Naam is the Support by which we hear of spiritual wisdom and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: naam ke dhaare simrit bed puraan |
lines.english: The Naam is the Support of the Simritees, the Vedas and the Puraanas.
The Naam is the Support of all bodies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਰੇ ਸੁਨਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: naam kai sang udhare sun sravan |
lines.english: Associating with the Naam, listening to it with the ears, one is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਸਭ ਭਵਨ ॥
lines.translit: naam ke dhaare pureea sabh bhavan |
lines.english: The Naam is the Support of all worlds and realms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਸਤਿ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਤਿ ਅਸਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: roop sat jaa kaa sat asathaan |
lines.english: His form is true, and true is His place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਨੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis aapanai naam laae |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord mercifully attaches to His Naam

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਉਥੇ ਪਦ ਮਹਿ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak chauthe pad meh so jan gat paae |5|
lines.english: - O Nanak, in the fourth state, those humble servants attain salvation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੂਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: karatoot sat sat jaa kee baanee |
lines.english: His acts are true, and true is His Word.
His personality is true - He alone is supreme.
The True Lord is permeating all.
His root is true, and true is what originates from it.
True is His lifestyle, the purest of the pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਰਚਨਾ ਸਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: sat karam jaa kee rachanaa sat |
lines.english: True are His actions; His creation is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸ੍ਵਾਸੁ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bisvaas sat naanak gur te paaee |6|
lines.english: Nanak has obtained true faith from the Guru. ||6||
The True Name of God is the Giver of peace.
All goes well for those who know Him.
One who knows and loves the Truth

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਪ੍ਰਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: sat te jan jaa kai ridai praves |
lines.english: True are those into whose hearts He enters.
True are the Teachings, and the Instructions of the Holy.
He Himself knows His own state and condition.
He Himself is True, and all that He has made is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat taa kee gat hoe |
lines.english: chanting the Naam, he obtains salvation.
